staticCommands.name: cp
staticCommands.description: Copies data between Azure Storage Accounts. WARNING! If you specify multiple sources or targets, you will use Hydra Jump Sharding. Very useful for re-sharding data.

options.description: Scope the task to single Storage object by name (eg. Table name).
Set value for the overriden properties.

staticCommands.name: rm
staticCommands.description: Remove all objects from target storage accounts.

options.description: Scope the task to single Storage object by name (eg. Table name).
